understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate each level to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', completing BP35 and then continuing to subsequent levels until the game is won, while staying within the per-attempt turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn I could MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only). After a horizontal move, gravity automatically carried the character in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile (e.g., o/m/w), hitting a hazard, or reaching '+'. Landing on spike tiles (u/v) immediately ended the attempt. CLICK interacted with clickable/breakable tiles (x), removing them at a specified [x,y] to open or alter fall paths; CLICKs did not move the player. UNDO would revert the previous action. Planning relied on the structured fall-destination previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to choose safe moves, prioritize passage columns that change y-level, and use clicks to clear blocks that prevent progress in the gravity direction.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate each level to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', completing BP35 and then continuing to subsequent levels until the game is won, while staying within the per-attempt turn limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn I could MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only). After a horizontal move, gravity automatically carried the character in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile (e.g., o/m/w), hitting a hazard, or reaching '+'. Landing on spike tiles (u/v) immediately ended the attempt. CLICK interacted with clickable/breakable tiles (x), removing them at a specified [x,y] to open or alter fall paths; CLICKs did not move the player. UNDO would revert the previous action. Planning relied on the structured fall-destination previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to choose safe moves, prioritize passage columns that change y-level, and use clicks to clear blocks that prevent progress in the gravity direction.
